variables.notes: Candidate list appears incomplete for SG&A because 'Staff costs' is a clear overhead component in the Income Statement but was not included among candidates. No explicit populated SG&A subtotal row exists, so selected overhead components. Included 'Research and Development Expense' as well per rule because it exists as a separate expense line and likely is not already included in the chosen overhead components; manual review recommended to confirm whether share-based compensation is already embedded in staff costs and whether R&D is separately reported in all years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Staff costs, [Income Statement] Research and Development Expense

candidates.why: Direct dedicated R&D expense line.
